title: Maa's Morning Fog
description: Data pack that adds fog at dawn that dissipates over time
body:
## Maa's Morning Fog 
A small data pack that adds fog at dawn. The fog fades over time.
This data pack adds nothing new to the game, just a nice visual effect. Compatible with most other data packs. Should be compatible with other data packs that add biome fog![Fog at moonlit sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c985464b6a27860868d2a4eaffdb581cfb36618d.jpeg)
![Fog in the old growth spruce forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f323893c66f4c268bc552672d044d8ae8aa74abf.jpeg)
![By this time the fog had cleared](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/175c1b4f9fb4e4bd526c5df470955598384474a2.jpeg)
